04 = Unable to use the shower or tub and is bathed in bed or bedside chair; 05 = Unable to effectively participate in bathing and is totally bathed by another person
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0670_PR_BATHING (M0670) Prior Bathing Prior ability to wash entire body. 00 = Able to bathe self in shower or tub independently
01 = With the use of devices, is able to bathe self in shower or tub independently
02 = Able to bathe in shower or tub with the assistance of another
